emails.subject: Re: Congrats
emails.body: Re: Congrats Vince, You beat me to the congrats. The surprise was that I already believed you were a Managing Director, so a long overdue congratulations to you. Laura Vince J Kaminski@ECT 01/11/2000 10:13 AM
